get your calendar ready... 📅

Peter – You won’t believe all the events we have lined up
for this week. And you’re invited to all of them!

First up is How to Communicate Your Message Through Virtual
Events this Tuesday, May 11 at 1pm ET.

Whether you’re a candidate, campaign staffer, or local leader,
this training is a must. You’ll learn all the best practices for
running successful virtual events!

Sounds great, right? Click here to RSVP now to take your virtual
events to the next level!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiOWJoaWgxY2pjMW81aWdocmNhc3YiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vcUtCbmpmbjRUNC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNTA5MjFfdmx0X3JvdW5kdXBcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ )

This training will teach you the importance of consistent

Fine-tuning your messaging is crucial for any campaign. And you

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiOWJoaWgxY2pjMW81aWdocmNhc3YiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vcDZsODlnZGY4MC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNTA5MjFfdmx0X3JvdW5kdXBcdTAwMjZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ )

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Something scary Ken Cuccinelli said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28946299/284830817/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5KC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Zjg2ZWIzYi1hMWIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErAENvhmw6w6SdriL6JJ8V8twjJ3AGIx9dEtiNJztbU=)

| | Ken Cuccinelli said something terrifying this weekend, while he was shilling for the self-funding millionaire Pete Snyder at the GOP Convention:

History is on the side of Republicans in 2021.

And, Derek, he’s right. The party that wins the White House historically has lost the Virginia governor’s race. The deck is stacked against us.

Election analysts at 538 have said this race is going to be the most competitive election all year. And Republicans are clearly running to win, having outraised us Democrats two-to-one so far.

[**With history, election forecasters, and fundraising numbers all stacked against us, we need massive momentum if we’re going to stop Republicans from winning in November. Chip in $17 today to help us build a campaign strong enough to turn the tide of history.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28946300/284830818/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5KC&amount=17&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Zjg2ZWIzYi1hMWIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErAENvhmw6w6SdriL6JJ8V8twjJ3AGIx9dEtiNJztbU=)

After all, Republicans were _supposed_ to win in 2013 after Barack Obama was re-elected. But we defied history then. We can do it again -- but only with your help.

name: Latinos for America First
subject: Latinos for America First Media Advisory
body:
‘Latinos for America First’ President, Bianca Gracia, Headlines Exclusive ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ May 13-16, 2021 in Dallas, TX FOR IMMEDIATE R
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=355630.2148.1.4eb5fa4a1db42114ddd1df767231468e) |
---
‘Latinos for America First’ President, Bianca Gracia, Headlines Exclusive ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ May 13-16, 2021 in Dallas, TX **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Prima facie, the following ‘Media Advisory’ has been issued on behalf of Bianca Gracia, President of Latinos for America First on April 28, 2021. (Dallas, TX)—First and foremost, ‘Latinos For America First’ and ‘Latinos For Trump’ is proud to announce the headlining, keynote speaker at this year’s exclusive ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ is the prestigious grassroots organization’s Founder and President, Hon. Mrs. Bianca Gracia- a proud Texan-native, mother, wife and child-of-Christ. The annual ‘Faith ‘N /& Freedoms Conference’ event is co-hosted by Hon. Matt Couch and Pastor Brian Gibson and will take place, live, Delta Hotel Allen, Texas from May 13-16, 2021, according to the official event flyers posted on social media, and will feature an all-star lineup of 50+ VIP’ and noteworthy speakers, live Christian bands, conservative local food/beverages and like-minded merchandise vendors. Respectfully, please join us in praying for and congratulating Latinos for America First’s President, Bianca Gracia, (who) has been bestowed with the honor to be featured as a prestigious ‘Faith & Freedom Conference’ Keynote Speaker at a private venue near Dallas, Texas as between: Thursday, May 13, 2021 through Sunday, May 16, 2021. Prima facie, the exclusive four-day series of events taking place in beautiful Allen, Texas- celebrating America’s God-fearing, Church-going family of Patriots, within carrying-out the #FaithNFreedoms Conferences’ mission of ‘teaching the principles of Christ, Country and the Constitution’ live and in-person to all attendees, daily.
# FaithNFreedoms Conference: May 13-16, 2021 in Dallas, TX
At this year’s #FaithNFreedoms Dallas Conference, the Nation’s Top Pastors and Christian Political Influencers in America come together for a weekend speaking on the principles of Christ, Country, and the Constitution. According to the ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ event website, there are over 50+ Speakers, VIPs, Influencers, Public Figures, Pastors, current and former Politicians, Conservative Entertainers and notable Media Pundits. Moreover, in addition to Latinos for America First President Bianca Gracia, other Latinos for America First Board Members will also share the stage with Bianca Gracia. Our very own Victor Avila, Kenny Lee, and Stephen Willeford will be featured #Faith&Freedoms (Allen, TX) In addition other 2021 Conference, keynote speakers include (but are not limited to): special appearances by all of the following- a live Q/A Session with ‘Cat Turd’- a premiere, first-time appearance by this social media prodigy, exclusive to ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’. Additional #FaithNFreedoms (Dallas) Conference Headliners and Key Note Speakers included in this year’s all-star lineup of ‘Who’s Who’ in Conservative circles also include: Hon. Pastor Greg Locke, US Navy SEAL & Vets for Child Rescue Founder Craig Sawyer (and Veterns For Trump/America First Official Ambassador), Pastor Brian Gibson (co-host), Robby Starbuck, Hon. (Co-Host) Matt Couch,, Mike Yoder, Buzz Patterson, Dr. Cordie Williams, Mindy Robinson, Gary Sheffield, Jr, Pastor Mark Burns, Nicole Nogrady, Eric Matheny, Col Rob Maness, Doni Anthony, Pastor Dave Scarlett of His Glory TV, UFC Hall of Famer Pat Miletich, Ed Butowsky, Chuck Callesto, Rachel Hamm, Eric Wnuck President of We The People Pack, Chris Lippe, Bobby Jeffries, Bob Lancia, Dr. Jason Alexander Roberge, Kyle Becker, Tony Shaffer, Karlyn Borysenko, Aja Smith, Jeff Dornik, Patrick Howley, DB Fugate, CJaye from the Deplorable Choir, Michael Johns, Landon Starbuck, and Dr. Willie Montague, and many, many more TBA.
Please take note that more up-to-date information about this special event and for additional details/to purchase individual ticket sales (both daily and weekly packages available) can be found online, at the official ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ website at: www.FNFTickets.com . Latinos For America First Founder & President, Bianca Gracia: Biography
Hon. Mrs. Bianca Gracia currently serves at the Latinos for America First/ Latinos for Trump Grassroots Coalition President. Gracia, of Houston, Texas, is the co-founder and current President of Latinos for Trump organization and Executive Director of Latinos for America First PAC. Bianca graduated with honors from St. Mary’s University where she majored in Public Justice, and has spent the past 16 years serving the community in her beloved home-state of Texas. These multifaceted roles include, but are not limited to- as a Board Member for ‘The Mountains in Motion Ministry, St. Anne’s Catholic Church Eucharistic Minister and Wedding Coordinator, Cub Scout Leader, Parent-Teacher Organization President, Director of her Home Owner’s Association, Team Mom of both soccer and baseball youth clubs, home-school educator, Republican Party of Texas Statewide Hispanic Engagement Director, Faith and Freedom Coalition Texas State Director, Harris County (TX) Precinct Chair, ‘Leaders de la Comunidad’ President, Board of Directors of ‘Christians Engaged’, ‘Blexit: Texas’ State Director and Advisor, ‘Americanos Conservatives United’ President and host of ‘La Conservadora Tejana’ on 1440 Keyes Radio. Through Bianca’s vast breadth and depth of experiences have highlighted her unmatched ambition, laser-focused drive and extensive track-record of success- nationwide- to educate and motivate Latino communities on how conservative principles were truly applicable to all Hispanics. In her personal life, Mrs. Gracia is the proud mother of two sons and honored to be the wife of a decorated Army Veteran and current Sergeant of Police. Finally, to learn more about the ground-breaking grassroots work being done by Latinos for America First/Latinos for Trump or to donate, please visit the organizations updated websites at: www.LatinoTrumpCoalition.org/latinosforamericafirst.com and on the official social media handles of @Latinos for America First / @OfficialLFT2020, @officiallatinosfortrump respectively.
# #
Media Contact: Press Secretary, Kristie Tertel, Kristie.Tertel@gmail.com
---
Kind Regards Latinos for America First

FaithNFreedoms Conference: May 13-16, 2021 in Dallas, TX At this year’s #FaithNFreedoms Dallas Conference, the Nation’s Top Pastors and Christian Political Influencers in America come together for a weekend speaking on the principles of Christ, Country, and the Constitution. According to the ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ event website, there are over 50+ Speakers, VIPs, Influencers, Public Figures, Pastors, current and former Politicians, Conservative Entertainers and notable Media Pundits. Moreover, in addition to Latinos for America First President Bianca Gracia, other Latinos for America First Board Members will also share the stage with Bianca Gracia. Our very own Victor Avila, Kenny Lee, and Stephen Willeford will be featured #Faith&Freedoms (Allen, TX) In addition other 2021 Conference, keynote speakers include (but are not limited to): special appearances by all of the following- a live Q/A Session with ‘Cat Turd’- a premiere, first-time appearance by this social media prodigy, exclusive to ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’. Additional #FaithNFreedoms (Dallas) Conference Headliners and Key Note Speakers included in this year’s all-star lineup of ‘Who’s Who’ in Conservative circles also include: Hon. Pastor Greg Locke, US Navy SEAL & Vets for Child Rescue Founder Craig Sawyer (and Veterns For Trump/America First Official Ambassador), Pastor Brian Gibson (co-host), Robby Starbuck, Hon. (Co-Host) Matt Couch,, Mike Yoder, Buzz Patterson, Dr. Cordie Williams, Mindy Robinson, Gary Sheffield, Jr, Pastor Mark Burns, Nicole Nogrady, Eric Matheny, Col Rob Maness, Doni Anthony, Pastor Dave Scarlett of His Glory TV, UFC Hall of Famer Pat Miletich, Ed Butowsky, Chuck Callesto, Rachel Hamm, Eric Wnuck President of We The People Pack, Chris Lippe, Bobby Jeffries, Bob Lancia, Dr. Jason Alexander Roberge, Kyle Becker, Tony Shaffer, Karlyn Borysenko, Aja Smith, Jeff Dornik, Patrick Howley, DB Fugate, CJaye from the Deplorable Choir, Michael Johns, Landon Starbuck, and Dr. Willie Montague, and many, many more TBA. Please take note that more up-to-date information about this special event and for additional details/to purchase individual ticket sales (both daily and weekly packages available) can be found online, at the official ‘Faith & Freedoms Conference’ website at: www.FNFTickets.com . Latinos For America First Founder & President, Bianca Gracia: Biography Hon. Mrs. Bianca Gracia currently serves at the Latinos for America First/ Latinos for Trump Grassroots Coalition President. Gracia, of Houston, Texas, is the co-founder and current President of Latinos for Trump organization and Executive Director of Latinos for America First PAC. Bianca graduated with honors from St. Mary’s University where she majored in Public Justice, and has spent the past 16 years serving the community in her beloved home-state of Texas. These multifaceted roles include, but are not limited to- as a Board Member for ‘The Mountains in Motion Ministry, St. Anne’s Catholic Church Eucharistic Minister and Wedding Coordinator, Cub Scout Leader, Parent-Teacher Organization President, Director of her Home Owner’s Association, Team Mom of both soccer and baseball youth clubs, home-school educator, Republican Party of Texas Statewide Hispanic Engagement Director, Faith and Freedom Coalition Texas State Director, Harris County (TX) Precinct Chair, ‘Leaders de la Comunidad’ President, Board of Directors of ‘Christians Engaged’, ‘Blexit: Texas’ State Director and Advisor, ‘Americanos Conservatives United’ President and host of ‘La Conservadora Tejana’ on 1440 Keyes Radio. Through Bianca’s vast breadth and depth of experiences have highlighted her unmatched ambition, laser-focused drive and extensive track-record of success- nationwide- to educate and motivate Latino communities on how conservative principles were truly applicable to all Hispanics. In her personal life, Mrs. Gracia is the proud mother of two sons and honored to be the wife of a decorated Army Veteran and current Sergeant of Police. Finally, to learn more about the ground-breaking grassroots work being done by Latinos for America First/Latinos for Trump or to donate, please visit the organizations updated websites at: www.LatinoTrumpCoalition.org/latinosforamericafirst.com and on the official social media handles of @Latinos for America First / @OfficialLFT2020, @officiallatinosfortrump respectively. # Media Contact: Press Secretary, Kristie Tertel, Kristie.Tertel@gmail.com Kind Regards Latinos for America First | | | "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" ©2021 Latinos for Trump | 6725 Fairmont Pkwy num 102 Pasadena Tx 77505 | = "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" | ?

| | Derek,

Self-proclaimed “Trump in heels” Amanda Chase would spell disaster for Virginia, but there’s another candidate who’s giving her a run for her money.

Pete Snyder is a self-funding millionaire who was recently endorsed by Trump’s mouthpiece, Sarah Huckabee Sanders. He’s everything Amanda Chase is -- but turned up to 11.

**With Snyder’s millions and growing support from Trump loyalists, we need all the support we can get to take him on.[Will you please pitch in $15 to help us take him on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28952133/284851287/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5V&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWVkOWZiZC1iMGIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpLcA1n5tbGCB-vNYLQvtTUD1E0zPKuL15mPvH-alXM=)**

Pete’s been sucking up to Trump since he launched his campaign. He claimed Joe Biden stole the 2020 election and went so far as to hire my former right-wing opponent Ken Cuccinelli to run a sham “electoral security operation.”

Derek -- Pete Snyder would be a terrible governor who’d turn the clock back on all the progress we’ve made over the last 8 years. **And here’s what really worries me about him: he outraised us last quarter.**

That’s right. Pete Snyder poured millions of his own money into his campaign and he’s showing no sign of stopping.

subject: My plan for justice reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General
body:
|
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bxEhEToQT_ux8epAf9iN116DnwiJOBkc1KIl_OMiT3k=/nHyBpfkI--hvYsfFCzZeea_oLAk3O_Bbq6V6rYrwVuQ=)
---
Friend -- Today, I am proud to announce my plan to bring true justice reform to Virginia. [**Read more about it by clicking here!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bxEhEToQT_ux8epAf9iN116DnwiJOBkc1KIl_OMiT3k=/6_HHNA2kgp93CWxFbGtre28gWtxNYn0LznwFC41a3wM=) I'm running for Attorney General because we've made progress in building a more fair and equitable Commonwealth, but we all know we have not come far enough. We need leaders who will rise to this moment in our history and create real change in our justice system. This plan will help us do just that by working to root out the vestiges of Jim Crow and slavery from our criminal code, from our judicial system, and from our policing. I know these policies will not erase hundreds of years of inequality, but I believe they are a critical next step. As Attorney General, I will never stop pushing forward and fighting for progress. \- Jay Jones

**Latinos for America First’ Condemns Vicious Defamatory Attacks** ’ ___________________________________________________________
May 10, 2021 (Houston, TX ) – On the advice of in-house counsel, ‘Latinos for America First’ is unable to comment at this time on the hateful, defamatory acts by self-proclaimed ‘rival’ conservative ‘organizations.’ We invite you to pray for the spiritually afflicted during this difficult time. Additionally, the Executive Board unanimously congratulates all organizations nationwide in their continued successes in our shared-mission in forwarding the ‘America First’ policy agenda nationwide. Latinos for Trump is a non-profit organizational registered in Texas and Latinos for America First is a nationally-registered PAC with the Federal Ethics Commission. We encourage you to learn more about the ground-breaking grassroots work being done by Latinos For America First/Latinos For Trump and/or to support our grassroots efforts, please visit our organizations updated websites at: www.latinotrumpcoalition.org /latinosforamericafirst.com and on the official social media handles of Latinos For America First @OfficialLFT2020.

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: join me in supporting the Virginia House Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28956766/284858414/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjU5MjY1My1iNWIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dV0ntauYjUzVxWOu-IXZl79YTBgUUGGikcR8hT85yRc=&emci=04a349cf-6ba7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=7f592653-b5b1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

We've all seen the headlines about Republican state legislatures passing outrageous voter suppression laws that roll back mail-in voting and even make it a crime to hand out water bottles at polling places. But while other states are attacking the right to vote, Virginia is leading the way with new laws expanding access to the ballot box.

Some folks forget that just a few years ago, Virginia was a hotbed of restrictive voting laws and illegal gerrymandering. Thankfully, we turned things around by flipping the General Assembly blue and electing Democrats who have championed the right to vote.

**[With control of Virginia's House of Delegates on the line, that progress is on the ballot this November. clean_body: | | | Derek, We've all seen the headlines about Republican state legislatures passing outrageous voter suppression laws that roll back mail-in voting and even make it a crime to hand out water bottles at polling places. But while other states are attacking the right to vote, Virginia is leading the way with new laws expanding access to the ballot box. Some folks forget that just a few years ago, Virginia was a hotbed of restrictive voting laws and illegal gerrymandering. Thankfully, we turned things around by flipping the General Assembly blue and electing Democrats who have championed the right to vote. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split equally with Mark Warner and the Virginia House Democratic Caucus: = = = = = = Since we flipped the General Assembly in 2019, we've made incredible progress. VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000
conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the
Republican Party?

Don't want to receive our emails? Unsubscribe here. (https://email.vervemail.com/p/o6WryBjlNO)

https://landing.electjimjordan.com/rep-leadership/?iter=39715a17-dc29-47c3-840f-d07afd546e54&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=trumppoll&utm_medium=hf&red=majority%2f%3finitiativekey%3d
KYMAL2XW388I&rev=228

Peter,

At the Conservative Political Action Conference in Orlando,
President Trump took the stage and declared that, "We went
through a journey like nobody else... we began it together four
years ago, and it is far from being over."

I couldn't agree with that sentiment more.

I want to hear what you think - Do you agree that Trump is still
the leader of the Republican Party?
(https://landing.electjimjordan.com/rep-leadership/?iter=39715a17-dc29-47c3-840f-d07afd546e54&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=trumppoll&utm_medium=hf&red=majority%2f%3finitiativekey%3d
KYMAL2XW388I&rev=228)

My team and I have set a goal to find 50,000 conservative
patriots to take our poll by Saturday, May 8th. As of this
morning we've received responses from 45,000 conservatives, which
means to hit our goal we need 5,000 poll responses today.

Take my survey today by following the link below:
(https://landing.electjimjordan.com/rep-leadership/?iter=39715a17-dc29-47c3-840f-d07afd546e54&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=trumppoll&utm_medium=hf&red=majority%2f%3finitiativekey%3d
KYMAL2XW388I&rev=228)

https://landing.electjimjordan.com/rep-leadership/?iter=39715a17-dc29-47c3-840f-d07afd546e54&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=trumppoll&utm_medium=hf&red=majority%2f%3finitiativekey%3d
KYMAL2XW388I&rev=228

As Joe Biden enters his fifth month in office, Americans have the
opportunity to reflect on the work President Trump did to advance
our conservative agenda.

Before COVID-19, President Trump built the world's most
prosperous economy. He brought jobs, factories and industries
back to the United States. He rebuilt and invested in rural
America. He passed historic tax relief for the middle class. He
made historic inroads towards peace in the Middle East.

Not to mention, he garnered the attention and action of millions
of grassroots conservatives and Republicans around the country,
reinvigorating the party with his bold leadership.

In my eyes, Trump is still the leader of the Republican Party.
Will you take my survey right now to let me know if you agree or
not?

3. **House Democrats have already targeted this district for use of their $30 million war-chest they have** , [**and the only way Republicans can stand a chance is if we hit the ground running. body:
🐷🐷🐷
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KnJmSxptNXvh4wqJ6KR35niJENJPay22lx9hT9g-Uu2MkFAlIOb4LVPC4u3bHgO6LzixW86GgLqGw4_dnDLCNy3MgNyxPkvfuDzQspe39YTriOm1zg4ew-5O7Go3yysc30Ma7oIB2DGdnX_zyosiNZXm5P7SWNdRDhNWQtFM0XB9svtP_-xHiu9nhwvkWshfs3seEwnmOraZgbVlxy2k-nAW5Vh5tjW0TW1T83sJq60cyUodAwohMjXMR_SAIIVZQU8GipFOHRrA5934PI9kesrTA84pdGIV3uDe8K96ucc4mUAnrQmsWvvKWv5ZJUC1IQT5O8ebUzwIkIqydEfmjSgkftWX_TxFoehSXjRGa7YWqepGTzPqPpjj8_w0qvr0-QpSqm_lP75pcF5bo3xJuZhF8CCEMle810j7n8phEDo=&c=AO2d857GQOUNP4RHpFzfLHqTkNVM_AyjFu6lzzIr8k7T3ZBgEXwDWQ==&ch=FGgIZ-AL6PKMDU3x71nLbW0RbK239H61sTn4TwHuhwgW2aFyDbEUyA==)
Friend --

**Joe Biden and AOC are on a mission to destroy our way of life. **

Democrats recently reintroduced the **Green New Deal** , and it's the most EXTREME environmental proposal America has ever seen. Among the most concerning parts of the plan is its blatant attempt to decimate the animal agriculture industry.

With its $93 trillion price tag and ridiculous limitations placed on beef producers and livestock ranchers, the Green New Deal would be an absolute DISASTER for middle America.
**[**SAY NO TO THE GREEN NEW DEAL**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KnJmSxptNXvh4wqJ6KR35niJENJPay22lx9hT9g-Uu2MkFAlIOb4LVPC4u3bHgO6LzixW86GgLqGw4_dnDLCNy3MgNyxPkvfuDzQspe39YTriOm1zg4ew-5O7Go3yysc30Ma7oIB2DGdnX_zyosiNZXm5P7SWNdRDhNWQtFM0XB9svtP_-xHiu9nhwvkWshfs3seEwnmOraZgbVlxy2k-nAW5Vh5tjW0TW1T83sJq60cyUodAwohMjXMR_SAIIVZQU8GipFOHRrA5934PI9kesrTA84pdGIV3uDe8K96ucc4mUAnrQmsWvvKWv5ZJUC1IQT5O8ebUzwIkIqydEfmjSgkftWX_TxFoehSXjRGa7YWqepGTzPqPpjj8_w0qvr0-QpSqm_lP75pcF5bo3xJuZhF8CCEMle810j7n8phEDo=&c=AO2d857GQOUNP4RHpFzfLHqTkNVM_AyjFu6lzzIr8k7T3ZBgEXwDWQ==&ch=FGgIZ-AL6PKMDU3x71nLbW0RbK239H61sTn4TwHuhwgW2aFyDbEUyA==)**
---
Joni Ernst knows firsthand the importance of supporting farmers and ranchers in America's heartland. Joni grew up on a farm in Iowa that her family still operates today, and she knows just how devastating the Green New Deal would be for the ag community.

It's clear that the Left is aiming to please their megadonors and rich friends on the coast with this thoughtless climate agenda while they utterly disregard the rest of the country. But our agriculture workers are the backbone of America. Joni is doing everything she can to stand up for farmers across the country and protect us all from this disastrous plan, but she can't do it without your help, Friend.

[**CLICK HERE to help Joni fight back against Joe Biden & AOC's attempts to make Iowa squeal >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KnJmSxptNXvh4wqJ6KR35niJENJPay22lx9hT9g-Uu2MkFAlIOb4LVPC4u3bHgO6LzixW86GgLqGw4_dnDLCNy3MgNyxPkvfuDzQspe39YTriOm1zg4ew-5O7Go3yysc30Ma7oIB2DGdnX_zyosiNZXm5P7SWNdRDhNWQtFM0XB9svtP_-xHiu9nhwvkWshfs3seEwnmOraZgbVlxy2k-nAW5Vh5tjW0TW1T83sJq60cyUodAwohMjXMR_SAIIVZQU8GipFOHRrA5934PI9kesrTA84pdGIV3uDe8K96ucc4mUAnrQmsWvvKWv5ZJUC1IQT5O8ebUzwIkIqydEfmjSgkftWX_TxFoehSXjRGa7YWqepGTzPqPpjj8_w0qvr0-QpSqm_lP75pcF5bo3xJuZhF8CCEMle810j7n8phEDo=&c=AO2d857GQOUNP4RHpFzfLHqTkNVM_AyjFu6lzzIr8k7T3ZBgEXwDWQ==&ch=FGgIZ-AL6PKMDU3x71nLbW0RbK239H61sTn4TwHuhwgW2aFyDbEUyA==)
**[**SAY NO TO THE GREEN NEW DEAL**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KnJmSxptNXvh4wqJ6KR35niJENJPay22lx9hT9g-Uu2MkFAlIOb4LVPC4u3bHgO6LzixW86GgLqGw4_dnDLCNy3MgNyxPkvfuDzQspe39YTriOm1zg4ew-5O7Go3yysc30Ma7oIB2DGdnX_zyosiNZXm5P7SWNdRDhNWQtFM0XB9svtP_-xHiu9nhwvkWshfs3seEwnmOraZgbVlxy2k-nAW5Vh5tjW0TW1T83sJq60cyUodAwohMjXMR_SAIIVZQU8GipFOHRrA5934PI9kesrTA84pdGIV3uDe8K96ucc4mUAnrQmsWvvKWv5ZJUC1IQT5O8ebUzwIkIqydEfmjSgkftWX_TxFoehSXjRGa7YWqepGTzPqPpjj8_w0qvr0-QpSqm_lP75pcF5bo3xJuZhF8CCEMle810j7n8phEDo=&c=AO2d857GQOUNP4RHpFzfLHqTkNVM_AyjFu6lzzIr8k7T3ZBgEXwDWQ==&ch=FGgIZ-AL6PKMDU3x71nLbW0RbK239H61sTn4TwHuhwgW2aFyDbEUyA==)**

body:
We need Scott Franklin
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IEBeKtifzMZlApXbpRNbcx9k4ya4cmVPMlvs7rhK5OhWoaC69DmHy1l9-EXsokrQnILho7ujGaHLmD3LQ1gm-T2mwT7vHju2BHfGKh2iqvvRv5cl7-PzZUGVOeMwazsGN1WZbHrG7qPP8pYu5E3KtFEni3dyErfFOhR_6QgfcV0YSCNA3O-SMQ==&c=YniK4aUBNH1XDuuDdifGt2Xu8VzJ9xDC0RbSnMbsystidIm7BRCTeQ==&ch=e22YJrvXN7fWqgw60Cg8g44h4rngSqQEFZ4mcKrQggIm_TJq3XoQFQ==&jrc=1)

| Patriot,
In January, Floridian Scott Franklin and I teamed up as freshmen members of the United States House of Representatives from Florida. Through our time working together, Scott has proven that he is the type of top-notch patriot we need representing our state in Washington, D.C.
---
| | | [SUPPORT SCOTT FRANKLIN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IEBeKtifzMZlApXbpRNbcx9k4ya4cmVPMlvs7rhK5OhWoaC69DmHy1l9-EXsokrQnILho7ujGaHLmD3LQ1gm-T2mwT7vHju2BHfGKh2iqvvRv5cl7-PzZUGVOeMwazsGN1WZbHrG7qPP8pYu5E3KtFEni3dyErfFOhR_6QgfcV0YSCNA3O-SMQ==&c=YniK4aUBNH1XDuuDdifGt2Xu8VzJ9xDC0RbSnMbsystidIm7BRCTeQ==&ch=e22YJrvXN7fWqgw60Cg8g44h4rngSqQEFZ4mcKrQggIm_TJq3XoQFQ==&jrc=1)
---
| As a Naval Academy graduate who served 26 years in the Navy and ran a small business in Lakeland, Scott turned his focus to Florida. He served his community at the local level, and now, he's taken our conservative cause to Washington to stand up for our values and protect our communities.
A devout Christian and father, Scott believes our conservative values are something worth protecting, which is why he was called to serve Florida in Congress. I know he will stand up for our great state and help stop the radicals in Washington from tearing our country apart.
Both Scott and I are standing up to the radical left's attempts to open our borders, take our guns, and raise taxes on the American people. [Can we count on your support?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IEBeKtifzMZlApXbpRNbcx9k4ya4cmVPMlvs7rhK5OhWoaC69DmHy1l9-EXsokrQnILho7ujGaHLmD3LQ1gm-T2mwT7vHju2BHfGKh2iqvvRv5cl7-PzZUGVOeMwazsGN1WZbHrG7qPP8pYu5E3KtFEni3dyErfFOhR_6QgfcV0YSCNA3O-SMQ==&c=YniK4aUBNH1XDuuDdifGt2Xu8VzJ9xDC0RbSnMbsystidIm7BRCTeQ==&ch=e22YJrvXN7fWqgw60Cg8g44h4rngSqQEFZ4mcKrQggIm_TJq3XoQFQ==&jrc=1)

Hey Peter — This morning, my team and I huddled to discuss our game plan for these final weeks leading up to Election Day — we crunched our numbers, ran the budget, and strategized on how to reach undecided voters before June 8th. We also talked about the historic nature of our campaign and what it would take for us to win. You might not know this, but Virginia has never had a female Lt. Governor, nor have we had a woman of color elected to statewide office. So I mean it when I say the odds are set against us and winning this thing won’t be easy. We’re going to need a strong grassroots movement to help us break that glass ceiling. And with you on our team, I know we can make history. That’s why I’m asking: **Will you say you’re all-in and chip in toward our campaign right now? America is in a race against time, but McConnell is holding us back, and forcing us to move at a turtle’s pace.

### **[Tell Mitch: "Stop Slowing America's Recovery"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8b7c42d-a2c8-4353-9350-829427bdf0cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
America is trying to recover from a pandemic and a recession, but [Mitch McConnell now says his top priority is stopping EVERY proposal from President Biden](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8be5b142-71ba-486a-910a-6a26dabeb952/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), regardless of how sensible or popular it is. America is in a race against time, but McConnell is holding us back, and forcing us to move at a turtle’s pace. **Enough is enough. [Tell McConnell “Stop Slowing America’s Recovery.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa6da1cc-e045-4d6f-9901-c1c87cfc4d97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [****](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafc47d29-eea9-482e-9d7f-c0aa1fca726c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Tell Mitch: "Stop Slowing America's Recovery"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f0d3bef-0d5c-4fd0-a455-9840c0ce951a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40a072ce-2527-428a-a48d-852410ee5928/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)(and help an endangered turtle in the process)**

name: Nick4WA Campaign Team
subject: It's Official
body:
We are officially kicking off the campaign, come join us.
| | | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_kick_off&n=1)
---
| Peter, This morning Nicolaus sent out a [press release](https://www.nick4wa.com/press_release?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_kick_off&n=2) officially declaring his candidacy for the U.S. Senate. To celebrate we are hosting a Virtual Campaign Kick-Off Event on Saturday, May 15th. This event will be hosted by Nicolaus and it is free to join. Spots are limited so please make sure your RSVP now! **[RSVP Here](https://www.nick4wa.com/campaign_kick_off?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_kick_off&n=3)** or Text **NICK** to **253.785.9099** to RSVP [](https://www.nick4wa.com/campaign_kick_off?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_kick_off&n=4) Nicolaus for U.S. Senate Campaign Team

body:
I’m so glad to have you on this journey with us. I know that it’s going to be a long road to Election Day, and we’ve got a lot of work to do before then. That’s why I wanted to take a minute to welcome you to our team. | | | Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Congress in Virginia's 1st District. Support Stewart's campaign [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28961145/284872785/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE0NzYwMy1jM2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Mf6SulNI_IoJ4df7kHWwa1-aCauMXTBN_z0kaRoF4=).
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28961146/284872793/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE0NzYwMy1jM2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Mf6SulNI_IoJ4df7kHWwa1-aCauMXTBN_z0kaRoF4=) Peter, I’m so glad to have you on this journey with us. I know that it’s going to be a long road to Election Day, and we’ve got a lot of work to do before then. That’s why I wanted to take a minute to welcome you to our team. Too many Americans have lost faith in our country. I want folks to believe in America -- to believe in the promise of America. I grew up on a farm, attended public schools, graduated from the Naval Academy, and spent over 30 years in the Marines. I intend to approach this campaign with the same dedication and work ethic that I learned on the family farm and in the Corps -- and I know we can win. There are many challenges still facing our nation, from gun violence to healthcare to hyper-partisanship, but I intend to go to Washington to be a champion for all Americans by bringing people together to get the job done. If you can get on board with what we’re trying to do, I welcome you to this campaign and this movement to win Virginia’s First District and encourage you to **[chip in $10 today so that we can run a strong campaign into the midterms.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28961147/284872795/-1471272961?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE0NzYwMy1jM2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Mf6SulNI_IoJ4df7kHWwa1-aCauMXTBN_z0kaRoF4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28961148/284872797/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE0NzYwMy1jM2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Mf6SulNI_IoJ4df7kHWwa1-aCauMXTBN_z0kaRoF4=) | [**DONATE $25 NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28961149/284872799/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE0NzYwMy1jM2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Mf6SulNI_IoJ4df7kHWwa1-aCauMXTBN_z0kaRoF4=)

body:
She’s “what we need!”
| [**BREAKING NEWS:
President Trump Endorses Elise Stefanik**](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X3FiCa5z7SDUw3rAUkiEwpc71iAhajxYI88MYNYnH0hVHNJVOzh42f4uHSkXpzC_C52xDX_5kUCgdN9MZCQZKzeanMIcmliknJ5Li1-0PQq_F_mBiPPks7fRwLLVZk5qH_1gb1jghnmvI3_L5PSjsrQoEK9IGnhpffUR4BKD1lFxdNQ_1MWAFWEdh9dSjHX3xGCAzwgKu9_g3fD7o-5I1Y__uwBli2SK1Svkvvp9A30QZnavmBG_jbxaLAJp6iETq3lYmq4aWI6oHq2L_EoEH8S&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=865033092794145143_p&n=1) Peter, Did you see the news? Incredible! **[President Trump has officially endorsed Elise Stefanik for GOP Conference Chair.](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X3FiCa5z7SDUw3rAUkiEwpc71iAhajxYI88MYNYnH0hVKgImiNMWXi8HitjK6t-LiA2VfXAHO84MKNKf1OflvrofvZXQpaMoTVCQA7Rp8sLmJh_Q3OUU-AR5_Uuew0pg1o07xZ5YR_vlbVO1vuPbInMJWEDyjMSsQVInqZ-daFc0eld-_q3-YmVeNLCv3pdNnwToPE3-ln7WLMH73qG9XkHAMh6NdBrB0ExpEeqPEk-BgZYrvY5zzQf4EZ16uJO6izlqCh5kbfpbPETDDk1AqWv&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=865033092794145143_p&n=2)** Here’s what he had to say: The House GOP has a massive opportunity to upgrade this week from warmonger Liz Cheney to gifted communicator Elise Stefanik. Elise has intelligence, an endorsement from American Patriot Brandon Judd and the National Border Patrol Council, she has an A+ from the NRA, and she loves our Veterans. We need someone in Leadership who has experience flipping districts from Blue to Red as we approach the important 2022 midterms, and that’s Elise! She knows how to win, which is what we need! _\-- President Donald J. Trump (05/10/21)_ This is a BIG MOMENT, but we need to MAKE IT EVEN BIGGER. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: respectfully asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
I'll start by saying how grateful I am to have you in my corner. I'm honored to have the chance to serve Granite Staters in the Senate -- and I know that I wouldn't be here without grassroots supporters like you.
**Now there 's something you should know, everyone:__**_I very nearly lost in 2016._ If I had, Democrats would not hold the Senate majority today.
Pundits say that I'm one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection, and recent polls show me behind.
Showing strength early is the ONLY way to defend this Senate seat, but our fundraising has really slowed this month. [**That 's why I'm asking you to please give $3 or as much as you can to move the polls in our favor, win in New Hampshire and protect our fragile majority in the Senate.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc80c/2a380d31/263bddbf/f00dfb/1545867914/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUxMF9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210510_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

Peter -
We’re witnessing one of the biggest attacks on our voting rights in decades.
**After a surge in voter turnout propelled Joe Biden to the White House and flipped the Senate blue, Republicans in state legislatures across the country are introducing voter suppression bills at a breakneck pace.**
Georgia started the wave by passing some of the most restrictive voting laws in the country — and Florida followed in their footsteps just days ago. President Biden condemned this voter suppression as “un-American" and the “Jim Crow of the 21st century.” And we couldn’t agree more.
**[Add your name now and stand with President Biden and Democrats who are fighting back against voter suppression and defending our right to vote>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28961882/284875048/-982611038?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZTgyMjFjLWM2YjEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6vHNx8ZBQlvv5lhrNRvjiDpEUKOrb-hXxvfe64SYMmg=&emci=785db851-9fb1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=cbe8221c-c6b1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=16951753)**
Republicans know their unpopular, extremist policies can’t win in a fair election, so they’re trying to rig the system in their favor: limiting absentee voting, expunging voter rolls, and cutting back early voting days.
**[Add your name, Peter, and tell Republicans across the country that you stand with President Biden and demand they protect our right to vote>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28961885/284875051/-982611038?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZTgyMjFjLWM2YjEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6vHNx8ZBQlvv5lhrNRvjiDpEUKOrb-hXxvfe64SYMmg=&emci=785db851-9fb1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=cbe8221c-c6b1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=16951753)**
Thanks for joining our fight,
Team Unite
* * *
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.

Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Everyone is moving to Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
They love... |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2df8fa5fb1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fdfdb52268&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

Governor DeSantis is showing the country how to live freely- and how to govern a free people. He isn't accepting the woke leftist garbage that Biden is shoving down everyone's throats.

All of us have been complaining for years about the dictatorial censorship by Big Tech.

These companies are run by far-Left extremists who (like Soviet Russia) think that no one needs free speech, and are arrogant enough to think that censoring politicians- ONLY CONSERVATIVES- is within their power.

They banned President Trump, while he was still President. They have banned countless conservative candidates who dared speak that which the Tech Lords disagreed with.

As Twitter and Facebook became more and more Orwellian, many of us cried out for leadership.

Governor DeSantis obliged.

_The Florida House and Senate voted this week to pass legislation that would prohibit social media companies from banning politicians.

Fines for social media companies that try to ban politicians from their platforms could add up to $250,000 a day for statewide politicians and $25,000 a day for other elected officials, the Sun-Sentinel reported.

The bill, which still allows for politicians to be suspended for two weeks and for individual posts to be taken down if they violate the company’s policies, is now headed to Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis._

Every time they stifle free speech and debate against their political opponents, make it hurt until shareholders change leadership. That is how you protect the rights of Floridians- AND Americans.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cccae8b8d7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| I agree with Townhall:

_The woke zealots who run these companies are taking cues from the liberal media and the Democratic Party to censor conservatives. It’s just another day of conservative America facing Goliath._And we need to start getting slingshots ready. __

Every single day, more of our freedoms are getting taken by the woke crazies of the Biden Administration. Communists in Federal government, Communists in Big Tech, Communists teaching our schools.

_Governor DeSantis of Florida is fighting them all- and with incredible efficiency._

**But we need to fix Congress- and elect Congressmen who will put into code, the solutions Gov. DeSantis is installing in Florida.**

Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and protect the lives and property of innocent people, we must fight them with everything we have and in every single day.

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. But this near loss has not put the fear of God into him yet- **so this year I'm back to finish the job!**

I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution. I will roll back the tyranny of Big Government, Big Tech, and Big Teacher Unions.

If you're like me, you value your freedom. If you're like me, you want to fight for it! [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=71784c91d7&e=afa21b7626)

[Can I count on you for your maximum donation to elect a fighter and a patriot to Congress?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fdc5039a1e&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and knock down Big Tyranny!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0bd7958fbf&e=afa21b7626)

**_Let's get this done!_**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b3afabc0f9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f58411eb10&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1ff028e372&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=af2e91caef) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=af2e91caef).

Peter,
---
This is outrageous.
---
Kamala Harris is now blaming _her_ border crisis on... _“climate change.”_
---
I’ll tell you the truth about what’s causing the border crisis:
---
* **_🚨Ending construction of President Trump’s wall_**
* ** _🚨Incentivizing illegal immigrants to cross our border_**
* ** _🚨Refusing to deport criminals guilty of assault, theft, and drunk driving_**

---

clean_body: She refuses to take responsibility for the border crisis. | Peter, This is outrageous. Kamala Harris is now blaming her border crisis on... “climate change.” I’ll tell you the truth about what’s causing the border crisis: 🚨Ending construction of President Trump’s wall 🚨Incentivizing illegal immigrants to cross our border 🚨Refusing to deport criminals guilty of assault, theft, and drunk driving We need Republicans to fight back and secure the border, which is why I became the National Chair of pro-Trump Navy SEAL Eric Greitens’ Senate campaign. How can Kamala look the American people in the eye and lie to us by saying that the border crisis is being caused by climate change?** Joe Biden appointed Kamala to fix the border crisis, but she refuses to take even an ounce of responsibility. Worse yet, there are too many RINOs in Washington who lack the spine to stand up to Biden and Kamala and do what it takes to secure the border. Conservative, pro-Trump fighters like Navy SEAL Eric Greitens are our only hope of restoring security to the southern border. name: Tea Party Patriots Citizens Action
subject: Action Items for the week of May 10th: National Police Week
body:
| |
---
This week is [National Police Week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMwLTdkMWU1MTVhMGRkMDRkMjg5Y2Y2ZDhlMTE5NjkwNzYz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saWNld2Vlay5vcmcvP21pZD00Mzc2MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Y0ZVll39hp_j5KkkKEuATQ), and we are asking you to focus on thanking the police in your community. Policing has always been a hard job, but it is particularly challenging right now, and must feel thankless at times. So, let’s show our appreciation for our local police this week!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Celebrate National Police Week**
Some suggested ways to celebrate your local police are:
* **Ask your local leadership to Pass a Resolution ([sample language here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMwLTdkMWU1MTVhMGRkMDRkMjg5Y2Y2ZDhlMTE5NjkwNzYz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2V3ZWVrbWljaGlnYW4udXMxLmxpc3QtbWFuYWdlLmNvbS90cmFjay9jbGljaz91PWI3YzE1ZGYxOGY0ZDA2MzFkZWQ1MDUxMmQmaWQ9YmRkODUwNWVhYyZlPTQ1YmEyMjY0NTUmbWlkPTQzNzYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=8yFvUgg4twH94fK4YW0B9A); note the yellow highlights. You may want to tweak the resolution to reflect the most recent stats).

**
* **[Print out fliers and post](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMwLTdkMWU1MTVhMGRkMDRkMjg5Y2Y2ZDhlMTE5NjkwNzYz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2V3ZWVrbWljaGlnYW4udXMxLmxpc3QtbWFuYWdlLmNvbS90cmFjay9jbGljaz91PWI3YzE1ZGYxOGY0ZDA2MzFkZWQ1MDUxMmQmaWQ9MmNmNzQ0Y2UyNCZlPTQ1YmEyMjY0NTUmbWlkPTQzNzYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=0UdmPIOW-6A9cyT7pzWiHQ) in local friendly spaces.

**
* **Encourage businesses to offer a “Police Officer” special (discount, free coffee, etc) during Police Week.

**
* **Have a gathering in the public square, or along the highways of your town with “We love Police” signs.

**
* **Find ways to involve people in your community. [See ideas here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMwLTdkMWU1MTVhMGRkMDRkMjg5Y2Y2ZDhlMTE5NjkwNzYz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2V3ZWVrbWljaGlnYW4udXMxLmxpc3QtbWFuYWdlLmNvbS90cmFjay9jbGljaz91PWI3YzE1ZGYxOGY0ZDA2MzFkZWQ1MDUxMmQmaWQ9NzVkOTJiMzY2MCZlPTQ1YmEyMjY0NTUmbWlkPTQzNzYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=JifcJY2bqiSdOQDkhM8Vbw)

**
* **[Share our op-ed](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMwLTdkMWU1MTVhMGRkMDRkMjg5Y2Y2ZDhlMTE5NjkwNzYz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jbnNuZXdzLmNvbS9jb21tZW50YXJ5L2plbm55LWJldGgtbWFydGluL3dpbGwtbGVmdGlzdHMtY29udGludWUtcHVzaC1kZWZ1bmQtcG9saWNlLWRlc3BpdGUtMjAyMC1tdXJkZXJzLXNwaWtpbmc_bWlkPTQzNzYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=UYEZB54Vr7gVenz5MmLHLg) about why defunding the police is a very bad idea.**

* **Have your children or grandchildren color or draw a picture of thanks and drop it off at your local precinct.**

**History of Police Week**
_In 1962, President John F. Kennedy signed a proclamation which designated May 15 as Peace Officers Memorial Day and the week in which that date falls as Police Week. Currently, tens of thousands of law enforcement officers from around the world converge on Washington, DC to participate in a number of planned events which honor those that have paid the ultimate sacrifice._
_ _
_The Memorial Service began in 1982 as a gathering in Senate Park of approximately 120 survivors and supporters of law enforcement. Decades later, the event, more commonly known as National Police Week, has grown to a series of events which attracts thousands of survivors and law enforcement officers to our Nation's Capital each year._
|

|

body:
| | |

Our campaign is gaining momentum, and with less than a month before the primary (!), we’re continuing to defy the odds.

Peter, I don’t raise my hand for things unless I am confident I can rise to the challenge. Our polling, fundraising, and on-the-ground momentum proves we can win this campaign but we need to up our outreach and media strategy.

**That’s why I’ve asked my team to increase our media buy this week in key areas where we know we have high saturation of support.[They told me we can ONLY do this if we raise another $20,000 in the next 72 hours. Friend: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight just reported that Arizona's battleground governor's race is a "toss-up." Democrats have a real shot to win – but we have a big problem: Kelli Ward.

**Kelli Ward is the Arizona GOP's extremist leader – and she's aligning herself with Republicans like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene in an effort to defeat us and keep Arizona red. **
The Washington Post called Ward a leader of the "Stop the Steal" movement that spread Trump's big lie and led to an armed insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.

When that effort failed, she started pushing _23 voter suppression bills_ and a sham election "audit" in Arizona – all aimed at silencing the voters that turned Arizona blue in 2020 and delivered the presidency to Joe Biden and the Senate to Democrats.
**We need to be electing leaders who will defeat extremism, not defend it. That's why Marco Lopez (D) is running for governor of Arizona – and why the Kelli Wards of the world are desperate to hold him off. But when the stakes are this high, failure is not an option.**
Marco Lopez is the strong leader Democrats need to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona's governorship blue. But POLITICO is reporting that Republicans are getting ready to spend BIG to defeat us and keep this battleground red – and right now, we're falling short of our next fundraising goal.

subject: Biden is worse than Jimmy Carter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Worse than Obama |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=aecd4f6704&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots who are fearless in taking on the corrupt, big government Swamp, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=86661eb669&e=ba6e67b849)!

**If you saw Biden's disastrous speech last night, you know what's about to happen: a year and a half of the American People getting the short end from the Democrats, hoping the Republicans in the Senate hold firm and Joe Manchin keeps resisting. **

I think the NY Post summed it up perfectly:

_President Biden’s speech Wednesday night failed on all counts: It didn’t sell his latest spending plan, it didn’t sell his larger agenda — and, worst of all, it didn’t sell him._

_It seemed like he was just skipping whole paragraphs and even pages. You could see even Democrats wincing above their masks.

He tossed in a few blatant whoppers, like his repeated claims that economists “left, right and center” agree his program will work just as he says._

_Mixed in were lies about how he’d solved the border crisis as vice president, plus vague waves at a foreign policy (and trade: He talks “buy American” as much as the guy he replaced) and some noise about being tough militarily when the Defense Department is about the only federal agency he doesn’t want to spend more on.

The speech was packed with hoary clichés and empty rhetoric about unity, spiced with blather about “white supremacy” and “systemic racism” even as he was insisting (correctly) that nearly all cops only work hard to protect the public._

So there you have it: a mix of lies, delusions, and outrageous spending we can't afford and won't pass.

Oh, and calling us all racists. Sen. Scott was right to call out that nonsense.
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=8cc2397e81&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| But then, that's what the Swamp is.... a bunch of greedy, unscrupulous people who don't care about us, look down on us, and want to destroy the country.

**My favorite part was when he described the January 6 protests as "the greatest threat to our democracy since the Civil War". I mean, really?**

Since the Civil War:

-4 presidents were assassinated while in office

-A Bernie Bro shot up several Republican Congressmen in 2017 at a baseball practice

-Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Japanese

-The Constitution was amended to allow for Federal income tax.

-Islamic terrorists attacked the Twin Towers and Pentagon on 9/11.

Sorry Senile Joe, but there is no universe where January 6- where Duck Dynasty and a guy in a buffalo bikini strolled through Congress- is worse than any of that.

RINO Liz Cheney has been peddling that lie a lot too- and the Never-Trumper Congresswoman literally threw people out of the way to run up and fist bump with her fellow leftist, Biden.

**We need to get rid of the leftists of BOTH parties, including Biden, Pelosi, and Cheney!**

[We fight the right fights for the country. We depend on you to help us put patriots in a place to succeed!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=824faf52e7&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=433cbadc3e&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Picture a Congress without Pelosi or Harris. Picture a White House without Biden. We can achieve this! [Help us elect strong patriots instead!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c643cd00b5&e=ba6e67b849)**

The Swamp is full of Communists and traitors! [Your $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is c](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b08dc8dc04&e=ba6e67b849)[rucial to holding the Communists like Biden accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f840eecad5&e=ba6e67b849)

Don't let the Swamp beat good candidates. Let's make America strong again. We are always strongest when we FIGHT Communists, not when we elect them!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4edc9f0dc2&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=3e0eebc114&e=ba6e67b849)

Businessman
America First Donor

subject: Still want to help Harold? - Fill out the Volunteer Information Form, Today! - Earls for Georgia
body:
Hi Peter,

Thank you so much for signing up for updates on Earls.org! Harold and Rachel
are humbled by the number of people who signed up through the website in the
first hour after Harold's announcement!

The volunteer information form, HERE <https://forms.gle/PZRLw91NEAfm3sfX7> ,
is our first step to organize volunteers. You don't have to live in Georgia
or the congressional district to get involved. We will be engaging with our
grassroots volunteers to help with digital campaigns and some old-fashioned
ones too! If you want to help Harold win, please fill out the form
<https://forms.gle/PZRLw91NEAfm3sfX7> and become a volunteer today!

Don't have the time to volunteer but still want to help? You can donate HERE
<http://www.secure.winred.com/earls-for-georgia/donate> to help us buy yard
signs, pay for digital ads, or put Harold up on TV!

Thanks, Peter!

Team Earls

Earls.org

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Records about Abuse of Children Tied to Biden Border Crisis
body:
“We are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage of the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted in the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal authorities are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children crossing the border.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 10, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22861&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTEwMTg0MzE3) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Records about Abuse of Children Tied to Biden Border Crisis](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22861&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTEwMTg0MzE3)** “We are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage of the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted in the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal authorities are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children crossing the border. The unprecedented secrecy and censorship surrounding these sites compounds the problem and limits accountability,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Our lawsuit aims to expose the full truth about this particularly troubling consequence of the Biden administration’s lawlessness on immigration.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22861&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTEwMTg0MzE3)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22831&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3RhdGVtZW50LWZiLW92ZXJzaWdodC1ib2FyZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTEwMTg0MzE3) | **[Judicial Watch Statement on Facebook Oversight Board’s Decision to Support the Censorship of President Donald Trump](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22831&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3RhdGVtZW50LWZiLW92ZXJzaWdodC1ib2FyZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTEwMTg0MzE3)** Judicial Watch had argued that Facebook’s Oversight Board should have reversed the president’s ban because the ban is an affront to First Amendment protections of free speech, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the government. There is no credible evidence that President Trump either morally or legally incited violence. He was resoundingly acquitted by the United States Senate after the impeachment “prosecutors” failed to produce credible evidence he incited violence. For Facebook and its Oversight Board to suggest President Trump incited violence and that complaints about the administration of an election could incite violence is a political position aligned with the Left and political opponents of President Trump and his supporters. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22831&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3RhdGVtZW50LWZiLW92ZXJzaWdodC1ib2FyZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTEwMTg0MzE3)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22841&F=H&) | **[Big Tech Censorship & Government Collusion: Judicial Watch Reveals Secret History of 2020 Election](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22841&F=H&)** In California, we obtained more than 500 pages of documents showing how a state agency, the Office of Election Cybersecurity, tracked social media commentary and pushed Big Tech to take down posts. Included in the documents were so-called “Misinformation Daily Briefings” from the communications firm SKDK. The firm also was deeply involved in the Biden presidential campaign, developing its mail-in voting program for four key electoral states: Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Arizona. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22841&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYml0aW5nLWJpZGVuLWRvZ3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMDE4NDMxNw==) | **[Judicial Watch Files Lawsuit against Secret Service for Records of Biden White House Dogs after Biting Incidents](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYml0aW5nLWJpZGVuLWRvZ3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMDE4NDMxNw==)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the United States Department of Homeland Security for records of communication between Secret Service officials assigned to the White House regarding the Biden family dogs. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYml0aW5nLWJpZGVuLWRvZ3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMDE4NDMxNw==)

### [Judicial Watch’s Fitton on Durham Investigation: ‘I don’t know what we’re spending the money on’ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53656&L=22799&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLWR1cmhhbS1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTAxODQzMTc=) Just the News Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said Thursday morning that he’s no longer sure “what we’re spending the money on,” regarding the long-awaited report and potential prosecutions from Justice Department special counsel John Durham.

clean_body: “We are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage of the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted in the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal authorities are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children crossing the border. | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 10, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | “We are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage of the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted in the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal authorities are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children crossing the border. The unprecedented secrecy and censorship surrounding these sites compounds the problem and limits accountability,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Our lawsuit aims to expose the full truth about this particularly troubling consequence of the Biden administration’s lawlessness on immigration.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch had argued that Facebook’s Oversight Board should have reversed the president’s ban because the ban is an affront to First Amendment protections of free speech, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the government. There is no credible evidence that President Trump either morally or legally incited violence. He was resoundingly acquitted by the United States Senate after the impeachment “prosecutors” failed to produce credible evidence he incited violence. For Facebook and its Oversight Board to suggest President Trump incited violence and that complaints about the administration of an election could incite violence is a political position aligned with the Left and political opponents of President Trump and his supporters. ---|--- | | | | | In California, we obtained more than 500 pages of documents showing how a state agency, the Office of Election Cybersecurity, tracked social media commentary and pushed Big Tech to take down posts. Included in the documents were so-called “Misinformation Daily Briefings” from the communications firm SKDK. The firm also was deeply involved in the Biden presidential campaign, developing its mail-in voting program for four key electoral states: Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Arizona. ---|--- | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the United States Department of Homeland Security for records of communication between Secret Service officials assigned to the White House regarding the Biden family dogs. == ---|--- | | | = Just the News Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said Thursday morning that he’s no longer sure “what we’re spending the money on,” regarding the long-awaited report and potential prosecutions from Justice Department special counsel John Durham. “It’s now been two-plus years, and we’ve had virtually zero activity from Durham as best as anyone can see,” Fitton during an appearance on “Just the News AM.” = == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch received the records as a result of a June 2020 Iowa Open Records lawsuit that was filed after the Iowa Secretary of State failed to comply with a February 2020 request for records and communications about a Judicial Watch report regarding the accuracy of the state’s voter registration rolls (Judicial Watch v. Iowa Secretary of State (No. 05771 EQCE085973)). Judicial Watch was represented by Iowa lawyer Alan R. Ostergren of Des Moines, Iowa. == == Washington Examiner In its Freedom of Information Act lawsuit, Judicial Watch said it is seeking from the Department of Homeland Security “records of communication between Secret Service officials assigned to the White House regarding the Biden family dogs.” == = = = = = = | CLIPS == = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

We need to vaccinate over 70% of Americans to return to normalcy, and Ron Johnson’s conspiracies are slowing us down -- and harming Wisconsinites in the process.

Johnson’s lies are “truly, madly, deeply false.” And we can’t re-elect a senator who can’t listen to the science and medical experts.

It’s past time we put an end to the conspiracy theories and elect a Senator who wastes no time on lies and spends more time helping Wisconsin.

clean_body: Johnson’s lies are “truly, madly, deeply false.” And we can’t re-elect a senator who can’t listen to the science and medical experts. | = = Peter, Last week, Ron Johnson went on a right-wing radio show to continue spreading his anti-vaccine conspiracy campaign. From making up negative vaccine side-effects to saying people who had COVID don’t need a vaccine, everything he’s been spewing is a lie. We need to vaccinate over 70% of Americans to return to normalcy, and Ron Johnson’s conspiracies are slowing us down -- and harming Wisconsinites in the process. Johnson’s lies are “truly, madly, deeply false.” And we can’t re-elect a senator who can’t listen to the science and medical experts. name: Josh Hawley
subject: VIDEO: My Interview On Huckabee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Most conservatives agree that Big Tech is too powerful, but don’t know what can be done. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b498d8d2b1ec49dd8c99927550ee882b&_e=qlwelKub48PRgNJNWlGCz6PGFXWoKA83fYX6TZK7gHjtMzFJdSnK6w5nSqZjqe9EUSQT03j-1OWJON_D76lR1AVGPPhbqhj7Xa3M54yoBs_t9hnETSGRLBAX3h09MU-ttTeLbf1KHcRkGeQBGNUdWj-rEuYVuR2NMqyLcgoLWTrycl9jkdGdLif_eNHbYdreA6AnWX-23aajIcVetnmEZd_AUHOZuR9Muz1c-qOjaOrsq5rb8JOfkFm1_PxQoD90_HVitxdsbaGFsxw02FuK9GFGrq4q87PAIRNZENdt1kzEodKwVUnN65H9At3SiR9bq7PyXb30s4GxLBSE7amFWZ53mQqeaDyT_xUex6mBVW8YnZWSvq_t44YyJp5O1XQNo1wzVa66LGveVftMCfospw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
I talk a lot about how Big Tech is a threat to free speech and a monopoly that must be broken up.

Most conservatives agree that Big Tech is too powerful, but don’t know what can be done.

“**What can Congress actually do?** ” is a question I’m frequently asked, and **the answer is, “a whole lot.”**

I joined Mike Huckabee’s show this past week where I answered this very question.

_**Watch the clip, and let me know what you think!**_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b498d8d2b1ec49dd8c99927550ee882b&_e=qlwelKub48PRgNJNWlGCz6PGFXWoKA83fYX6TZK7gHjtMzFJdSnK6w5nSqZjqe9ES4vREkklIPmU99ajYRkB1IP4NL8phmiA3sRc-7Du5To5Yicw-j13W6LT5vNWewbHKzHQpQL7A41OvhHmbTm9rI7Tleuxig6mdZmM2GVY_eF-EDHvjajWQ9v-XRGZvxwz9-VzyS1lb2vtP1s-HpO_VwwKrAQQV-Ka62vuVZ0pTmtKzjO7UFkOS0fMFwCc5j_xZjb-L3stN8Tae2v0c_NqpeIpILcdlesx6gZTsZM85_E9dii-iGAf_n5m-4QqN3ztWNFdrmW3jhsQqpEL7dAVTTXLLsHF78fKmLF-7ZYlhLTPzK4hzHHPoTLfETAzcblV3Z8ZsVqXaCakEngAn6-9hg%3D%3D)
**The days of Silicon Valley controlling free speech and serving as the censorship arm of the Democratic Party are numbered. **

****I**** ’m not stopping my fight against censorship, monopolies, and digital oligarchs dictating the free speech of everyday Americans. **Will you join me?**
[**Join My Crusade Against Big Tech**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b498d8d2b1ec49dd8c99927550ee882b&_e=qlwelKub48PRgNJNWlGCz6PGFXWoKA83fYX6TZK7gHjtMzFJdSnK6w5nSqZjqe9ES4vREkklIPmU99ajYRkB1IP4NL8phmiA3sRc-7Du5To5Yicw-j13W6LT5vNWewbHKzHQpQL7A41OvhHmbTm9rI7Tleuxig6mdZmM2GVY_eF-EDHvjajWQ9v-XRGZvxwzEizkjXfxTmP4q6Og8aE80gZPkaDPnS-cQKCLdvnCFdHOYdPBsgPjnvWOlltzwfgcNVYj-1Z5-DjcSBPPVxAmfdvrz9zQEVgggvmQdGcwDuXYnTU8AglVpZAA4ip2kwaXUYHB0EtOpcZd6Sc4W_XsUVFYmhAi5WFxXe1m22JXX7LeRJKVRw9uLGQ9avKiPFPlizwIIyr8kyHlIBQkL2NeJQ%3D%3D)

Josh

name: Mike Collier
subject: Dan Patrick is officially the Trump candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
The news just broke, friend: Donald Trump has given Dan Patrick his full endorsement for lieutenant governor. It’s no surprise to me that the author of the Big Lie, the president who refused to listen to doctors or science, and the person who failed Texans at every turn of his presidency would endorse a fellow conspirator and failed leader like Dan Patrick. The good news is that Patrick nearly lost in 2018, Trump nearly lost Texas in 2020, and Texans are ready for a change from their extremist politics. As we say in Texas, that dog don’t hunt. But I have no doubt Trump will spend whatever it takes to try to keep Dan Patrick in power to do his bidding. **Taking on Dan Patrick and the Trump machine will be an uphill battle, so if I run, I’m counting on your support: Will you rush in a donation right now so we can build a movement strong enough to kick out Patrick and reject Trumpism once and for all?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28970967/284906893/-1231269280?express_lane=true&amount=10&&refcode=em210510-rr-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWUyMmM4MC1lN2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Phb7K-A48zS3GuH0UO3KCpuX6GSGKLbO7yyR_3Dm9F0=)

name: Mark Herring
subject: I need you with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
Friends,

After the most vote-suppressing nomination process in modern history, Virginia Republicans have chosen a Trumpian, pro-NRA, anti-healthcare, anti-civil rights and anti-choice candidate for Attorney General. This agenda would be a complete disaster and set us back for decades!

The truth is, the GOP sees our Democratic primary as an opportunity to get ahead while we have an election still to win on June 8.

This means I’ll be getting attacked from not only our Republican opponent, but our opponent in the primary as well -- and I really need your help. The next month is probably going to be the most important one for the future of Virginia, and I need you with me.

Will you please chip in $25 or much as you can so we can win the primary on June 8 and take the fight to our Republican opponent at the same time? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/MHVA-AG-Email-May2021-FR-May?refcode=E8560-20210510-Opponent2-SL-GOP-PlainText-CampaignNews-NA&amount=25]

Thanks,
Mark Herring

-----------------------------------

Attorney General Mark Herring is fighting every day for justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL Virginians.

"Serving as your Attorney General has been the honor of my life. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done."

Will you contribute now to help Mark win re-election and get back to work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mhva-ag-email-mar2021-footer?refcode=Efooter-SL]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mhva-ag-email-may2021-fr-may?refcode=Efooter-SB]

Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jzQEMVNH4U-wdMlDZtPd5w2] to only get our most important messages, or you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0837f8d1-bcb1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/50e22c80-e7b1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUyMmM4MC1lN2IxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTwobWzG2sg73N42B2mMHJqyjAVL4ascs92H-eqRXJA=&id=110637861 .
