name: Mike Lee
subject: have you read this to your kids?
body:
When I was growing up, parents worried about college indoctrinating their kids into radical socialists. Now, the indoctrination is starting even earli*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | [View this email in your browser](*|ARCHIVE|*)
---
| | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=190b567160a6497eaf4aa2e5517d14a1&_e=mpXh6cVuSr075_-Ys6F5LaWBzC5E93iLDXDrSKTjWp0NjhLl-p7UOwi6wBlLwV9AHSrV6zmjXq6nAT7-Yoma83DQcw3uam5Rh36qVp1aLl_hvf06XpicKoCsXQNEdHg1iE6HIZ0xwl7HNumeuvgL9A7LFwb0dUD-dK8LlY1jE3_A48KMXTEh_uXL59Q7DENveQZeZ2cxr0N6RrYEPhE6J0P-4ybQGmkNTJJGmrINbjl86_KPzm9Re5NKatcOPOtDb2uMHkkMpDuiobk8CCWOm5CdXon4BUGO5Yzxet9ERb8%3D "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

When I was growing up, parents worried about college indoctrinating their kids into radical socialists. Now, the indoctrination is starting even earlier.

Here are some recent examples that shocked me.
* Teachers are being forced to accept that math is a form of white supremacy.
* The National Education Association is calling on Biden to stop vouchers to private schools and no new charter schools. The goal seems to be to put all education under government control.
* Our public schools are being taken over by social justice advocates who believe everything is political, including grade school education.

All it not lost, Friend! I believe we have to take our education into our own hands. And I think I have found a solution.

**I want to introduce you to Connor Boyack. He is the author of the Tuttle Twins**. The Tuttle Twins is a book series, teaching children about free markets, private property rights, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers.

**[Can you support teaching younger generations about the ideas of liberty? Please click here to donate to the Tuttle Twins >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=190b567160a6497eaf4aa2e5517d14a1&_e=mpXh6cVuSr075_-Ys6F5LaWBzC5E93iLDXDrSKTjWp0NjhLl-p7UOwi6wBlLwV9AHSrV6zmjXq6nAT7-Yoma8xKoZlbgGDdbikC13oY0yoqA-vw_Sbs1hzZPZ10TgWweKNwBXnrzcv7OBUVjUa_Ys-D7y1ZKg1nBRpE0yZ-v2BsAOQfkRaT7VyInmnL0yCr8KxpUm1b_PfBe99ok81EpvWceG65LAWuYZQnvXLCHNwZ2MiHkSZp5Y-bwHaBIpAttGPBzDVHuWtdSzMbRF5xaLVZPAuW88WdrWZD3I3SmVDA%3D "Donate >>")**

Connor created the series when he realized there were no children’s books teaching these important topics. Connor’s organization, Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 1,000,000 copies of the Tuttle twins into the hands of homeschooled children, public schools, and libraries across the country during 2021. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=190b567160a6497eaf4aa2e5517d14a1&_e=mpXh6cVuSr075_-Ys6F5LaWBzC5E93iLDXDrSKTjWp0NjhLl-p7UOwi6wBlLwV9AHSrV6zmjXq6nAT7-Yoma85ThOmQlDMKrJwf4t-9k9V9JMBxdtW7JdxQv0obhJ50AQlUQm-RMBJFBmDOhSQGfzexSq-3ra9e9lwfGr7PxYIfUGjGOnXTZTnQvkiGtLrTknTy08oNBIm46JsgvtdDDUSvBCpGFy3_SXFkdFdlDqht5ouxxzP1jVx89sguqs9JMikDq-DoAshvOHRoa8fxDP5K8plGa4MtUCX-kVZhoZaQ%3D) _2 million copies of the Tuttle Twins have been distributed to families and children across the country._ The Tuttle Twins are a solution for parents or community members who are worried about the future of education.

I told Connor I would help him raise $50,000 to distribute 5,000 copies of the Tuttle Twins. Here how you can help Connor and Libertas Institute.

**[Friend, can you join me and donate $10, $25, $50, $100, or more to Libertas Institute and help us fight back against the socialists’ indoctrination in our schools? Click here to donate >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=190b567160a6497eaf4aa2e5517d14a1&_e=mpXh6cVuSr075_-Ys6F5LaWBzC5E93iLDXDrSKTjWp0NjhLl-p7UOwi6wBlLwV9AHSrV6zmjXq6nAT7-Yoma85NzIfiNLpw_odlNdU_RKOqR5qr3r5btew-Lm9EF1t6COwcrG8LdVRXxDXIi7atWIwy9mVK76PG8jVcR1j0-kAg4M6UnikDZR9wtHkJyVEviTr3dFCFtdRkOkTihnTtFuolqr11BqkULQ8cD2hDTMxSPaHJTcJXR2MQtIW16dj6AYMqoiqOZ-_imKllK7xn1jVrHMcoLwj7Tx711cB3zz2Q%3D)**

**One more important point... All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John P. You can double your impact! If you donate $100, John will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

Here’s how your support goes into distributing thousands of copies of the Tuttle Twins.

1. Libertas Institute is working with like-minded teachers and librarians to place books in school classrooms across the country.
2. They will also give teachers a lesson plan so students have an alternative to what is being taught in their textbook.

Now, the indoctrination is starting even earli|MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | |ARCHIVE| | | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, When I was growing up, parents worried about college indoctrinating their kids into radical socialists. Now, the indoctrination is starting even earlier. Here are some recent examples that shocked me. Teachers are being forced to accept that math is a form of white supremacy. The National Education Association is calling on Biden to stop vouchers to private schools and no new charter schools. The goal seems to be to put all education under government control. Our public schools are being taken over by social justice advocates who believe everything is political, including grade school education. All it not lost, Friend! I believe we have to take our education into our own hands. And I think I have found a solution. I want to introduce you to Connor Boyack. He is the author of the Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins is a book series, teaching children about free markets, private property rights, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. "Donate >>" Connor created the series when he realized there were no children’s books teaching these important topics. Connor’s organization, Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 1,000,000 copies of the Tuttle twins into the hands of homeschooled children, public schools, and libraries across the country during 2021. 2 million copies of the Tuttle Twins have been distributed to families and children across the country. The Tuttle Twins are a solution for parents or community members who are worried about the future of education. I told Connor I would help him raise $50,000 to distribute 5,000 copies of the Tuttle Twins. Here how you can help Connor and Libertas Institute. One more important point... All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John P. You can double your impact! If you donate $100, John will personally match it with another $100 gift.* Here’s how your support goes into distributing thousands of copies of the Tuttle Twins. 1. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Vote: Should Our Schools Reopen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
The science is clear: Our kids are safer in school, and our schools should return to in-person learning immediately. Every child in America deserves a Peter, The science is clear: Our kids are safer in school, and our schools should return to in-person learning immediately. Every child in America deserves access to in-person learning right now. In many states, students have been in-person for months. Sadly, in Pennsylvania, that still isn't an option for every child. **I have a quick question for you: Do you think we should open our classrooms for every child in Pennsylvania?** [**YES**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5c0fb1deaf4941cf99dbcc0d9b655c5b&_e=wdcJA4I4Lj8BssHOJBhwx8_T90tGQzc4o_40B5wjW5c0yVnbds1N-NcNnBE4cGHV9dXhuvcuVfqk1ZpRuxN6N74JR9SHBKNzUCn6FRlZ9oNtMgTGUvq295W3_wFX8iqUaHNQ7l0Jm0Hs3EJw9Sei6vmhdBM_8bNUL3Eeeawx5IqIKyouuYwSlfRdmOcuA_qlVjto6fl7btG5u3cTAafaEOIksFm30AM5hC-y7cCOLmTvHsu8LtD28yyThdzVjKZNC3xgDAEqRyUPVPFxpFiDShSSd7EHaWpQdDybgOp-kGIP54c-7E9GWQRw8EX661OF_5sJP-ZPqlLi3p0WHdiwh5qq8OhRPVy5OaabJEXNqv9dkjBGn799PRS7vuQxsQSWfrq67IjI8k5doBp3CVLiyfbSq-aOsed_UKpKPYhTin8WzDOtlMgwQwaMsnFZK1Js) [**NO**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5c0fb1deaf4941cf99dbcc0d9b655c5b&_e=wdcJA4I4Lj8BssHOJBhwx8_T90tGQzc4o_40B5wjW5c0yVnbds1N-NcNnBE4cGHV9dXhuvcuVfqk1ZpRuxN6N74JR9SHBKNzUCn6FRlZ9oNtMgTGUvq295W3_wFX8iqUaHNQ7l0Jm0Hs3EJw9Sei6vmhdBM_8bNUL3Eeeawx5IqIKyouuYwSlfRdmOcuA_qlDA1jxACPcDsjpxBhA2khDxl3lC3DYtfu4qtKIpP70AY9yvpYJ7FN0RgOP2GHZTY_TeTT1H7B8f660FEuY1-6lHLa2KWmaLiZKlX_CRlCCHns82iNtf5rN_4_N-t7wtQQ0AA68yata3jMBKDFcQuzmFgk_rIpqgIvysd1AbFK1eVtYXuLC2WxgiPAmTIdERt7ilYDNELh9c_MgtezLTw5U6dYwDd3YSVITKfOSEWZufarMyxUB4tfFNy7fANxDj8-) While the news is encouraging that students can return to the classroom in the coming months, our kids should not have to wait until the school year is almost over to return learning in person. We can’t afford to have our students fall behind while the rest of the country returns to in-person learning full time. **[What do you think? Should our schools safely reopen for students to learn in person? ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5c0fb1deaf4941cf99dbcc0d9b655c5b&_e=wdcJA4I4Lj8BssHOJBhwx8_T90tGQzc4o_40B5wjW5c0yVnbds1N-NcNnBE4cGHV9dXhuvcuVfqk1ZpRuxN6N74JR9SHBKNzUCn6FRlZ9oNtMgTGUvq295W3_wFX8iqUaHNQ7l0Jm0Hs3EJw9Sei6vmhdBM_8bNUL3Eeeawx5IqIKyouuYwSlfRdmOcuA_qlUQujW1wuiR854ZyTse0s9GuwaJyIr6hN-3FvhbKdwLmiKe1GxDpLBNxDirxwdbyM0ewSg5NTWSSPQOtCc2ENStuZIdIQnd4iaAwvHyO4w3xLDJua6XCzmEIBVQLx3EwVV9OyRO28UiF_9F00IUeqNjssCXYgh-SKvBfO-aIy66M9MpQPnF-giiC8h-731wq7_zLq1mjtACHvp9BjQGxHtwsytCYzcgSRcoPcwgn8NhF1M5_B8OLI4HIW4nhY7Sku)** [**YES**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5c0fb1deaf4941cf99dbcc0d9b655c5b&_e=wdcJA4I4Lj8BssHOJBhwx8_T90tGQzc4o_40B5wjW5c0yVnbds1N-NcNnBE4cGHV9dXhuvcuVfqk1ZpRuxN6N74JR9SHBKNzUCn6FRlZ9oNtMgTGUvq295W3_wFX8iqUaHNQ7l0Jm0Hs3EJw9Sei6vmhdBM_8bNUL3Eeeawx5IqIKyouuYwSlfRdmOcuA_qlzHerZfFoZCY7ovs4DKCrFkVkSPRiR4TcsDftwFI8Y4ZMwdMT9ZzkUEit0KU2M8SzdcyFj_dREFJXPcbaN8dae-sTVeB7Q2OVW0-OKcAAWEmCu-6IvyhxtNY6dSS_ygxhEbByOxdPAsZre4uiL-wpfOKI0kOXBrRaxcXPvntOGzi0s79wzCvMuE7DAmAQoL1cUzMmOqy9Q4EoQ5aCtT5K5lEiOGMU7rhcUwxmPcqkcAQzInQfcyr74AaDewJM11lp) [**NO**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5c0fb1deaf4941cf99dbcc0d9b655c5b&_e=wdcJA4I4Lj8BssHOJBhwx8_T90tGQzc4o_40B5wjW5c0yVnbds1N-NcNnBE4cGHV9dXhuvcuVfqk1ZpRuxN6N74JR9SHBKNzUCn6FRlZ9oNtMgTGUvq295W3_wFX8iqUaHNQ7l0Jm0Hs3EJw9Sei6vmhdBM_8bNUL3Eeeawx5IqIKyouuYwSlfRdmOcuA_qlQRGQIrq_rwq1v5fi85K9rAMgLkYFTupG8N9yw4DfYYOu3S166fSxwGperKt80CykszAa0dKGnpZ8FfO-xHUmMuDNCpDhQg_fcVTuRsh8MtoH1CQic-L_9z-MaCTLXMnJwO8_xt0ffEI1cnEtzJS3Z7kvaIWnbuBp5jq57E8vuSfIs0wycC6Z19yR-fI0hHkOPInc5s7EPPp7LPKX6cKp_qS9FngS8aCqfUUOmWHpPoX0TBboxd9AfrMSTmPrbW-P) Thank you for taking a brief moment to respond, Peter. body:

The Biden Economy has created the worst job miss in 23 years! Jeff wants to get your thoughts on the Biden Economy and how it’s affecting you. name: Border Defenders Team (Via NRCC)
subject: It's Time to Put the American People FIRST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now more than ever, it's crucial that we restore a conservative majority in Congress to stand against the Left's mishandling and negligence at our Southern Border.

To opt out of these emails, click [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk2Mjc3MDQ%3d&x=501dd95a)

There is no denying the facts, Fellow Conservative. _**There is a CRISIS at our Southern Border.**_

Record breaking amounts of immigrants reach our country's border every day, leaving us with crowded and overwhelmed border facilities and a humanitarian crisis on our doorstep.

**President Trump worked endlessly to keep Americans safe and secure our borders,** but Joe Biden and Kamala Harris continue to stay silent on the issue, allowing their partisan policies to become the root of U.S. immigration issues.

**Now more than ever, it's crucial that we restore a conservative majority in Congress to stand against the Left's mishandling and negligence at our Southern Border.[Will you help us take back the House and demand we secure our borders?](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/199928/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=c3fce904)**

[**SECURE OUR BORDERS**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/199928/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=83fdb004)

_The issue gets worse, Fellow Conservative._ The mismanagement we have seen by this administration has led to more than just inhumane treatment of the hundreds of people being stopped at our border, **this is an issue that is putting Americans across the country at risk**. _Since Biden took office, there has been an ALARMING INCREASE in attempts at smuggling dangerous and deadly drugs such as fentanyl across our border._

**Enough is enough.**

The Democrats refuse to put _America First._ They are more focused on destroying Trump's legacy than protecting the people they represent. The consequences of continuing without a Conservative majority will be detrimental to our country.

[**Please chip in today to stand against the Left and their destructive policies before it's too late.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/199928/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5de5d9e6)

Thank you,

Border Defenders Team (Via House GOP)

[**SECURE OUR BORDERS**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/199928/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=eeb66e3d)

** **
Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/112809/6/)
---

NRCC
320 First St SE
Washington, DC 20003

By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606).

NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/196300/7/). [Privacy Policy](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9627704/224717773/7/8/)

****
Dem MEGA FUNDRAISER targets Ron

Peter,

**First,** it was the radical far-left special interest groups that targeted Ron.

**Then,** it was CNN and the media that labeled him as a top target.

**Now,** national Democrat and MEGA FUNDRAISER Amy McGrath has placed Ron at the top of her target list for 2022.

Just last cycle, Amy McGrath raised nearly $200 MILLION to try and force her dangerous socialist agenda on hard-working Americans, and now Wisconsin specifically is in her sights.

She sent out a personal message to her sea of supporters asking for their help to flip Wisconsin blue. And would it surprise you if we told you she lied about Ron in this message?

name: Bob Fertik - Democrats.com
subject: Ban on single-use plastics
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100166117.545790.125&gen=1).

|
# Seals, turtles, whales, and more are dying because of our plastics. Congress must act now!
# **[](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100166117.545790.125&gen=1&mailing_linkid=19093)**
"Plastic production is expected to quadruple in the coming decades, and if nothing changes, the amount of plastic flowing into the ocean is projected to triple by 2040."

Those are the words of Christy Leavitt, a campaign director at the non-profit Oceana. She just led [Oceana's new report](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100166117.545790.125&gen=1&mailing_linkid=19094) on plastic pollution in our oceans -- and it's even worse than we feared. _Manatees and seals with their stomachs lacerated by food wrappers and recreational fishing lines. Sea turtles choked and drowned by plastic take-out bags. Whales with nothing in their empty, starving stomachs other than plastic, twisted and wrapped around their internal organs._

These aren't one-off occurrences. According to Oceana's in-depth research, in fewer than 10 years, more than 1,800 marine animals from a wide range of species have been murdered by our plastic waste that you and I consume and then dispose of. At least 88% of these animals are listed as endangered or threatened with extinction.

And the situation is only continuing to get worse.

Sign the petition to demand that Congress and President-elect Joe Biden implement a nationwide ban on single-use plastics! [SIGN NOW](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100166117.545790.125&gen=1&mailing_linkid=19093) . We really appreciate your participation in this petition. If you'd like to help us organize, [please join our Facebook community](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100166117.545790.125&gen=1&mailing_linkid=19095). Thanks for all you do! | ****| **Bob Fertik, President**
---|---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We’re demanding Medicare expansion in the American Families Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Folks are suffering with serious dental ailments, but they can’t afford to see a dentist.
#
Peter,
It’s absurd to make dental, vision, and hearing separate from other health care. And yet that’s part of the reality of America’s broken, for-profit health care system.
Two-thirds of Medicare recipients don’t have dental coverage today. Folks are suffering with serious dental ailments, but they can’t afford to see a dentist. And some can’t even get the critical dental procedures they need before having life-saving heart surgeries.
We need to expand Medicare, improve its benefits, and guarantee it to everyone. That’s why my friend Senator Bernie Sanders and I are leading the fight for Medicare expansion in the American Families Plan.
[**We can expand Medicare and lower the eligibility age, but only if we fight for it right now. Chip in $3 to pass this transformative health care expansion on our way to Medicare for All.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210510?refcode=em20210510-279&t=19&refcode2=279_420207_zdf84a&akid=279%2E420207%2Ezdf84a)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210510?refcode=em20210510-279&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=279_420207_zdf84a&akid=279%2E420207%2Ezdf84a)**
6 million people lost their dental insurance during the pandemic. Millions more couldn’t afford dental insurance before the pandemic. Dental care isn’t some extraneous perk — it’s an essential part of staying healthy. That’s why we need to guarantee dental health care for all — starting right now by expanding what Medicare covers and who is eligible for it.
We all know that the current for-profit health care system in America is broken. So broken that it costs lives not to guarantee health care as a human right. It’s time that we took a big step towards Medicare for All by implementing these transformative health care reforms.
[**We need to expand Medicare ASAP in the American Families Plan. Chip in to fuel our work so we can make sure it happens. Transformational change will take all of us.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210510?refcode=em20210510-279&t=21&refcode2=279_420207_zdf84a&akid=279%2E420207%2Ezdf84a)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210510-279-footer&t=22&refcode2=279_420207_zdf84a&akid=279%2E420207%2Ezdf84a)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Biden's Dismal Economic Policy
body:
| | | | Biden and his economic policies massively underperformed.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Last week, economists were forecasting that one to two million new jobs would be added to the economy in April. Unfortunately, _**Biden and his economic policies massively underperformed.**_

_**A dismal 250,000 new jobs were added even though many employers are desperate to hire.**_ Some restaurants and many small businesses are trying to hire — sometimes for up to $15 to $20 an hour — without success.

In the wake of Covid, many people support helping those who need assistance the most. However, while we are compassionate, _**we must ensure that EVERY able-bodied American who can work, works.**_ Our economy will go south quickly if we subsidize people to not work when they are healthy enough to do so.

As Attorney General, I am constantly battling to protect jobs and to fight fraud, waste, and abuse in government.
---
[](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMeGDxQoW7MMyy8kZf6zDLVtrU9u4kwLHfKcsJNPDGl0-2FE-3DNT4C_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz60rxgUp4A7zOiJZ6xYkcbJ7zWlN07Pa2U75qsjtfUFdqEjyoG840NzNjCTFFogVpjuqpYPvg9OY4TrqrYkQe7utqlSBxvUx8VMpm1IG33OB3B9-2Buy5DzzTYU-2Fnh9GnO4Jg0BoCeNkt-2FDW2-2FFEBfQwEJUAx7Fpv0jmC-2Fu2wExswEuYxob82bU3ux5eImBMWFO3WoEBPlgnkStiAGzBxf2NPcVz8ev3S062Q-2BorIlg-2F2q9A2-2Bb-2Bex8wlPvHzhCh0trDnhXVdisdoSguppNbqs9GB-2FjTKr7Au46BY1NGFJ-2BlNIP4LRwlWaM47RZEGRw8rNCkLFTBk31DESC50BHKkFeCNjIcd73RjVCL3-2F-2Bxl85xqKuR1lp3KpApb6hBMiaBsdbDi1NSzufsC-2BrIVhEzYg6PC9jYkPb0AZwGeQMxxjT-2Bh1XDLD8aaj6T-2FOEgbtttcKW0I99-2F7BjcDHanlouYqpxLjXeDSycmlYuumTmznzxgYNNWy3o5K7U6GbgmCLEYUpCwtrjfiU6DILMTGtn-2FuXwc0U6vjUxO6tkyw0PyOeE4oW2NMfLI7cXWEM-2FfCg-2BYcfJvB8v8nvSACxzLvoDS09-2FQbKnVZPR6SFJ1-2FID0NI3DYT9SDuFibn0jelaZddw5-2Fa5IiR5XExI5OUzno6NFTXV4pdDgOio6ZnaOGuXlYBULQcziilaeiL0-2B8AaVaTk8h8uWjvPjx-2Bpl2Q560NuSfsMRt-2B2IZb9OpK3NYHNRcCnbrvX0xxcO7t-2Bal8okI3HkuxHtsBgZn9QHdcAtw3FfFfs77g-3D-3D)
---
But I need your help!

Would you contribute $25 to Team Morrisey today so we can advance policies that increase employment?
_**
The far-left wants to silence me for fighting against their socialist and big-spending policies.**_

But I will not back down against those who are putting the American economy at risk.
_**
Work is noble. And workers are needed now, more than ever.**_

Will you help us push for policies that promote the value of work and attack policies that result in fraud, waste, or abuse?
---

clean_body: | | | | Biden and his economic policies massively underperformed. Dear Peter, Last week, economists were forecasting that one to two million new jobs would be added to the economy in April. Unfortunately, Biden and his economic policies massively underperformed. A dismal 250,000 new jobs were added even though many employers are desperate to hire. Some restaurants and many small businesses are trying to hire — sometimes for up to $15 to $20 an hour — without success. In the wake of Covid, many people support helping those who need assistance the most. However, while we are compassionate, we must ensure that EVERY able-bodied American who can work, works. Our economy will go south quickly if we subsidize people to not work when they are healthy enough to do so. As Attorney General, I am constantly battling to protect jobs and to fight fraud, waste, and abuse in government. But I need your help! Would you contribute $25 to Team Morrisey today so we can advance policies that increase employment? The far-left wants to silence me for fighting against their socialist and big-spending policies. But I will not back down against those who are putting the American economy at risk. Work is noble. And workers are needed now, more than ever. Will you help us push for policies that promote the value of work and attack policies that result in fraud, waste, or abuse? | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General A Leader in Defending America | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: President Biden's groundbreaking new bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Infrastructure's not just roads and bridges.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Last week, I was back home, visiting with Vermonters all over the state and listening to their concerns and hopes for the future. From conversations with small business owners and community leaders, one thing has stuck with me: Relief from the American Rescue Plan is here. We are seeing the benefits of the many programs, including the State Relief Grant which I helped secure $1.25 billion for Vermont. This legislation is helping Vermonters, ensuring businesses reopen safely and vaccines get in as many arms as possible. The American Rescue Plan has done so much, but there is much more we must do. We must now turn to address our long-ignored infrastructure. Infrastructure is not just roads and bridges but also broadband internet access, clean energy standards, updated wastewater networks, and child care investments. Infrastructure means more good-paying jobs, small business support, and even downtown revitalization for our towns. I know that, Vermonters (and Americans all across the country) understand that, and, thankfully, President Biden knows that, as evidenced by his groundbreaking new infrastructure bill, the American Jobs Plan. **[Now, we want to hear from you: If you agree with President Biden's push to address our nation's urgent infrastructure needs, sign your name alongside mine to show your support today.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/x4_3B2y~33FY/MXJyRVNMQWs5R0dldlE3bWhBM29sS2hGeldHc3owNE5IR29Sd2tFMnBqRFN5dzlrYldaRk5xLzFqNkliaGgyLzdOL2NPWXFNNjhKV3ovblBSWEVWOVFzZERRQkJMNyt0ZllMay9hMzVBM009S0/eGhlbzkrK0l2SUJwMjFrYm0zSUMvRlM2cFFERzdsYTRrM2VhNEgvRjJMMGw3aCt3L21WZEx6SDVDZkhsZElOT0I5U1dDN2JiRXByb0xkcUt3aWtQRkZOdzVFY3hpVzdBS0)** Thank you for making your voice heard. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy

name: Erica Smith
subject: Re: survey results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I dove into the data, and here’s what stood out to me.
#
Last week, our campaign sent out our priorities survey, and I’m so grateful that so many people took the time out of their day to share their thoughts with me. THANK YOU!!
We’re building a moral movement FOR the people, led BY the people, so hearing directly from you is key for the type of campaign we’re running.
We learned so much from our supporters after reading the results of our survey — and one thing is clear: **North Carolina is ready for bold, progressive change.**
[**_I’m ready to shake up the status quo and deliver for North Carolina. Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can) to help us build a massive grassroots movement for working people?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210510-1?refcode=em20210510-75&t=20&refcode2=75_3698_msGh8Q&akid=75%2E3698%2EmsGh8Q)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210510-1?refcode=em20210510-75&t=21&refcode2=75_3698_msGh8Q&akid=75%2E3698%2EmsGh8Q)**
As an engineer and a math teacher, I’m a little bit of a nerd (_okay, maybe more than a little bit_). I dove into the data, and here’s what stood out to me:
🗳️ **88% of our survey respondents listed “expanding voting rights” as one of their top issues they want me to fight for.** Our vote is our voice, but Republicans across the country are restricting and attacking access to the ballot box. We need the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to end voter suppression and protect the right to vote. ✊ Next up, **87% of our supporters shared the need for social and racial justice.** Injustice is structural and comprehensive, so our approach to combating it needs to be too, which is why I will fight for reparations, marijuana legalization, and ending mass incarceration. 🏥 And **80% voiced their strong support for Medicare for All.** Our broken healthcare system prioritizes profits over people. That’s fundamentally wrong and wholly immoral. In Washington, I will be a fierce advocate for Medicare for All and affirm that healthcare is a human right.
---
Our communities are facing unprecedented challenges and demand urgent action. We’re building a movement to take on these important fights, but I need your support.
[**If you’re with me, will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help grow our moral movement, win this Senate seat, and deliver real change for working people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210510-1?refcode=em20210510-75&t=22&refcode2=75_3698_msGh8Q&akid=75%2E3698%2EmsGh8Q)
Thank you!
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210510-75-footer&t=23&refcode2=75_3698_msGh8Q&akid=75%2E3698%2EmsGh8Q)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=75%2E3698%2EmsGh8Q)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=75%2E3698%2EmsGh8Q)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: BREAKING: we have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Don’t let Glenn Youngkin buy Virginia’s Governor’s office.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28974737/284936790/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5X&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDlhNGI3Zi1mZGIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDyUoO_N5y_zIhJMqIlt6etWbXPyuwXv1-1mgN5Sds=)

| | Derek,

News just broke that Virginia Republicans picked extreme Trump-supporter Glenn Youngkin to be their nominee for Governor.

I’m going to tell you why that’s worrisome in a moment, but before I do, I want to ask directly for you to support my campaign. This is a make or break moment and I need your help.

**[Please contribute $20 or more right now and help my campaign stop Glenn Youngkin and the Virginia GOP from rolling back our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28974738/284936791/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5X&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDlhNGI3Zi1mZGIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDyUoO_N5y_zIhJMqIlt6etWbXPyuwXv1-1mgN5Sds=)**

Youngkin might not call himself “Trump in heels,” but make no mistake: he is a Trump-sycophant just like Amanda Chase. He’s been endorsed by Ted Cruz and he’s made Georgia-style voter suppression a cornerstone of his campaign.

Glenn Youngkin is running to roll-back every inch of progress Virginia Democrats have won together in the last decade. That’s not just coming from me -- that’s what Glenn told Tucker Carlson he was going to do when he appeared on his show last week on Fox News.

**_Youngkin’s embrace of Trump’s right-wing agenda is terrifying, but here’s what’s even scarier:_**

Youngkin is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and he’s spent HUGE sums of his own money buying himself the Republican nomination.

Not only that, but now that he’s officially the nominee, an army of national right-wing mega-donors are already lining up behind him to dump mountains of cash into his campaign coffers.

Derek, it’s an uncomfortable fact, but Glenn Youngkin is going to have unlimited resources to fill Virginia’s airwaves with the same hate, division and lies that carried Donald Trump to victory in 2016.

We fought too hard to fire Donald Trump to let Glenn Youngkin bring Trumpism to Virginia through the back door.

**[I’m going to fight back with all I’ve got to stop him, but I need you with me -- can I count on you to chip in today and help us reach our goal of 5,000 grassroots donations?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28974739/284936792/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5X&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDlhNGI3Zi1mZGIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDyUoO_N5y_zIhJMqIlt6etWbXPyuwXv1-1mgN5Sds=)** | | | [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28974740/284936793/-2023814932?refcode=20210510_TM_5X&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDlhNGI3Zi1mZGIxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDyUoO_N5y_zIhJMqIlt6etWbXPyuwXv1-1mgN5Sds=)
